SELECT IPv4NumToStringClassC(ClientIP) AS k, count() AS c FROM test.hits GROUP BY k ORDER BY c DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT IPv4NumToStringClassC(num) FROM (SELECT ClientIP FROM test.hits WHERE ClientIP > 3232235776);
WITH (SELECT ClientIP FROM test.hits WHERE ClientIP < 3232235779) AS subquery SELECT IPv4NumToStringClassC(ClientIP) AS k, COUNT() AS c FROM subquery GROUP BY k ORDER BY c DESC;
SELECT h1.ClientIP, IPv4NumToStringClassC(h1.ClientIP) AS k, COUNT(*) FROM test.hits AS h1 JOIN test.hits AS h2 ON h1.ClientIP = h2.ClientIP GROUP BY k ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;
CREATE TABLE test.client_data (ClientIP UInt32, EventDate Date);
INSERT INTO test.client_data VALUES (3232235776, today()), (3232235777, today()), (3232235778, today() - 1);
SELECT IPv4NumToStringClassC(ClientIP) AS k, COUNT() AS c FROM test.client_data WHERE EventDate = today() GROUP BY k;
SELECT IPv4NumToStringClassC(num) FROM (SELECT ClientIP FROM test.client_data WHERE EventDate >= today() - 2) AS filtered;
WITH (SELECT IPv4NumToStringClassC(ClientIP) FROM test.client_data WHERE EventDate = today()) AS current_data SELECT k, COUNT(*) FROM current_data GROUP BY k ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;
